title: helianthemum canum
intro: Helianthemum canum, also known as frostweed, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of frostweed include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Frostweed is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
